task: 第 29 包：独立 Focus 对焦系统 UI 方案与接入前置

tap_focus.manual_focus_behavior: Tap does not exit MF; it shows MF active feedback and does not change focus.
tap_focus.locked_behavior: Tap does not change focus while AE/AF is locked.

long_press_lock.manual_focus_behavior: Long press is blocked in MF and asks user to return to AF.
long_press_lock.unlock_behavior: Long press while locked clears AE/AF lock and reapplies focus/exposure.

focus_semantics.af: Automatic focus state; tap focus and metering are available.
focus_semantics.mf: Manual Focus state driven by setManualFocusLensPosition(_:).
focus_semantics.lock: AE/AF lock state entered by long press; higher priority than MF/AF.

ui_options.name: Viewfinder edge Focus status capsule
ui_options.reason: Focus belongs to the viewfinder, stays out of the bottom five parameters, and can show AF/MF/AEAF-L persistently without occupying the bottom console.

ui_options.name: Top toolbar Focus capsule
ui_options.reason: Too far from the focusing action and risks crowding the top tool row.

ui_options.name: Contextual mini layer near focus marker
ui_options.reason: Strong context but higher collision and implementation risk; better after a persistent capsule exists.

recommended_next_package.name: 第 30 包：独立 Focus 状态入口 + AF / MF / LOCK 最小 UI 骨架
should_do: Add a small independent Focus status capsule at the viewfinder edge.
Add a small skeleton panel for AF / MF / LOCK status only.
Make Focus panel mutually exclusive with bottom parameter and lens panels.
should_not_do: Do not add a new manual focus ruler.
Do not change tap focus behavior.
Do not change long press AE/AF Lock behavior.
Do not add Focus back to EV/WB/TINT/ISO/S.

xcodebuild.command: xcodebuild -project /Users/sungning/Projects/SellerCamera/SellerCamera.xcodeproj -scheme SellerCamera -configuration Debug -destination "generic/platform=iOS Simulator" CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
xcodebuild.note: BUILD SUCCEEDED; existing nested project warning remains non-blocking.

risks: Focus capsule placement needs real-device visual validation to avoid covering the product subject.
Existing preview tap may both dismiss overlays and invoke tap focus; next package should preserve the current contract unless explicitly changed.
MF currently blocks tap focus and long-press AE/AF Lock; changing that should be a separate product decision.
